disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Three weeks of patchy hair loss with thick greyish scaling on the scalp, initially resembling bad dandruff
trigger_question_examples: When did the bald patches and flaking start?
How has his scalp changed over the last few weeks?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started about three weeks ago like really bad dandruff, then the flaky patches spread and his hair started coming out in those spots.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Tiny black dots in the bald patches where hair shafts have broken off flush with the scalp
trigger_question_examples: What do the bald patches look like up close?
Are the hairs falling out or breaking off?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: In the bald spots there are lots of little black dots, like the hairs have snapped off right at the skin.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute development over 48 hours of a raised, boggy, soft, tender pus-oozing mass on the vertex of the scalp
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the lump — when did it appear and what does it do?
Is anything coming out of the lump?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The big soft lump blew up over the last day or two on the top of his head, and it oozes yellow pus from little holes when it's touched.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe localised pain preventing sleep and normal play in a young child
trigger_question_examples: How is the pain affecting him?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's in agony — crying constantly, can't sleep, won't play, and screams if anyone touches his head.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Intense scalp itch over the preceding week and small follicular pustules around the mass
trigger_question_examples: Are there any little spots or pimples around the lump?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: His scalp has been really itchy this past week, and there are little pimple-like spots around the base of the hairs near the lump.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, no lethargy and no systemic illness — the child is systemically well apart from pain
trigger_question_examples: Has he had any fever or felt hot?
Is he floppy, drowsy or off his food, or just in pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever that I've noticed and he's not floppy or drowsy — he's eating and drinking, he's just in a lot of pain from his head.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recently acquired a new puppy at home with which the child plays frequently
trigger_question_examples: Any new pets or animals at home?
Has he been around any animals recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, we got a new puppy a little while ago and he's always playing with it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No difficulty swallowing, no neck stiffness with headache/photophobia, no drowsiness or confusion (negative deep-infection / systemic-spread screen)
trigger_question_examples: Any neck stiffness, bad headache, dislike of light, or drowsiness?
Is he confused or hard to wake at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, he's alert and talking, no stiff neck or headache, and he doesn't mind the light — it's really just his scalp that's the problem.
